diagrams.flowchart:
flowchart TD
  User["👤 User/Business"]
  Web["🌐 Web Dashboard"]
  API["⚙️ API Gateway"]
  Auth["🔐 Auth Service"]
  Billing["💳 Billing Engine"]
  Analytics["📊 Analytics Core"]
  Cache["⚡ Redis Cache"]
  DB["🗄️ PostgreSQL"]
  MQ["📨 Message Queue"]
  Export["📤 Export Worker"]

  User -->|login| Web
  Web -->|events| API
  API -->|auth check| Auth
  API -->|load metrics| Analytics
  API -->|cache hit?| Cache
  Cache -->|miss| Analytics
  Analytics -->|query| DB
  Analytics -->|publish| MQ
  API -->|subscription| Billing
  Billing -->|write| DB
  MQ -->|consume| Export
  Export -->|write| DB
diagrams.state:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> Trial
  Trial --> Active : subscribe
  Trial --> Cancelled : cancel
  Active --> Paused : pause_subscription
  Active --> Cancelled : cancel
  Paused --> Active : resume_subscription
  Paused --> Cancelled : cancel
  Active --> ChurnRisk : engagement_drop
  ChurnRisk --> Active : re_engage
  ChurnRisk --> Cancelled : cancel
  Cancelled --> [*]
diagrams.sequence:
sequenceDiagram
  participant User
  participant Web as Web App
  participant API
  participant Auth as Auth Service
  participant Billing as Billing Engine
  participant DB as Database

  User->>Web: Click Sign Up
  Web->>API: POST /auth/register
  API->>Auth: Create account
  Auth->>DB: INSERT user
  DB-->>Auth: user_id
  Auth-->>API: ok
  API->>Billing: Create trial subscription
  Billing->>DB: INSERT subscription
  DB-->>Billing: ok
  Billing-->>API: ok
  API-->>Web: 200 {token, user}
  Web-->>User: Redirect to dashboard
diagrams.timeline:
timeline
  title Meridian 2024-2025 Roadmap
  section 2024 Q1
    Jan : Subscription Analytics MVP : 3 team members on-boarded
    Feb : Dashboard v0 : KPI cards implemented
    Mar : Auth system : SSO integration started
  section 2024 Q2
    Apr : Export features : CSV/JSON support added
    May : Team collaboration : Role-based access control
    Jun : Analytics API : Public API v1.0 launched
  section 2024 Q3
    Jul : Predictive churn : ML model trained
    Aug : Mobile app : iOS beta released
    Sep : Integration hub : Zapier, Slack connectors
  section 2024 Q4
    Oct : Enterprise pricing : Custom contracts
    Nov : Advanced reporting : Custom dimensions
    Dec : Compliance : SOC2 type II certified
diagrams.class:
classDiagram
  class User {
    int id
    string email
    string name
    datetime created_at
    setPassword()
    getSubscription()
  }

  class Subscription {
    int id
    int user_id
    string plan
    datetime start_date
    datetime end_date
    string status
    addMetric()
    cancel()
  }

  class Metric {
    int id
    int subscription_id
    string name
    float value
    datetime timestamp
  }

  class Event {
    int id
    int subscription_id
    string type
    map data
    datetime created_at
  }

  User "1" --> "*" Subscription : owns
  Subscription "1" --> "*" Metric : tracks
  Subscription "1" --> "*" Event : records
diagrams.er:
erDiagram
  USERS ||--o{ SUBSCRIPTIONS : owns
  SUBSCRIPTIONS ||--o{ METRICS : tracks
  SUBSCRIPTIONS ||--o{ EVENTS : records
  SUBSCRIPTIONS ||--o{ INVOICES : generates
  USERS ||--o{ API_KEYS : has
  SUBSCRIPTIONS ||--o{ TEAM_MEMBERS : assigned_to

  USERS {
    int id PK
    string email UK
    string name
    string password_hash
    datetime created_at
    datetime updated_at
  }

  SUBSCRIPTIONS {
    int id PK
    int user_id FK
    string plan
    datetime trial_ends
    datetime billing_date
    string status
  }

  METRICS {
    int id PK
    int subscription_id FK
    string name
    float value
    datetime recorded_at
  }

  INVOICES {
    int id PK
    int subscription_id FK
    decimal amount
    datetime issued_at
    string status
  }

  API_KEYS {
    int id PK
    int user_id FK
    string key_hash
    datetime created_at
  }

  TEAM_MEMBERS {
    int id PK
    int subscription_id FK
    string email
    string role
  }
diagrams.journey:
journey
  title Customer Onboarding Experience
  section Signup
    Sign up with email: 5: User
    Verify email: 4: User
    Create organization: 5: User
  section Initial Setup
    Connect data source: 3: User
    Configure dashboards: 4: User
    Invite team: 4: User
  section First Value
    View analytics: 5: System, User
    Set KPI alerts: 4: User
    Export report: 5: System
  section Engagement
    Explore templates: 4: User
    Share with stakeholders: 5: System
    Integrate with tools: 4: System
  section Retention
    Upgrade to pro: 4: User
    Access premium features: 5: System
diagrams.architecture:
architecture-beta
  group api(cloud)[API Layer]
    service gateway(server)[API Gateway] in api
    service auth(database)[Auth Service] in api
  end

  group core(cloud)[Core Services]
    service analytics(database)[Analytics Engine] in core
    service billing(server)[Billing Service] in core
  end

  group data(cloud)[Data Layer]
    service cache(disk)[Redis Cache] in data
    service db(database)[PostgreSQL] in data
  end
diagrams.xychart:
xychart-beta
  title Monthly Recurring Revenue Growth
  x-axis [Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun, Jul, Aug, Sep, Oct, Nov, Dec]
  y-axis "MRR ($K)" 0 --> 150
  line [5, 8, 12, 18, 25, 35, 48, 62, 78, 95, 115, 138]
diagrams.pie:
pie title Meridian Customer Distribution by Industry
  "SaaS": 35
  "E-Commerce": 25
  "Financial Services": 18
  "Healthcare": 12
  "Retail": 10
diagrams.quadrant:
quadrantChart
  title Feature Prioritization Matrix
  x-axis Low Effort --> High Effort
  y-axis Low Impact --> High Impact
  quadrant-1 Do First
  quadrant-2 Schedule
  quadrant-3 Fill In
  quadrant-4 Reconsider
  API Rate Limiting: 0.3, 0.8
  Mobile App: 0.7, 0.8
  Dark Mode: 0.2, 0.3
  Custom Roles: 0.6, 0.7
  Advanced Exports: 0.5, 0.6
  Data Retention: 0.8, 0.7
diagrams.gantt:
gantt
  title Q4 2024 Development Timeline
  dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD

  section Infrastructure
  Redis Upgrade :infra1, 2024-10-01, 2024-10-07
  Database Sharding :infra2, 2024-10-08, 2024-10-21

  section Features
  ML Churn Model :feat1, 2024-10-01, 2024-10-28
  Custom Dashboards :feat2, 2024-10-08, 2024-11-04
  Slack Integration :feat3, 2024-10-22, 2024-11-11

  section QA & Release
  Testing & Fixes :test1, 2024-11-05, 2024-11-18
  Production Release :release1, 2024-11-19, 2024-11-20

discovery: === Agentic Mermaid Package Discovery - FINAL COMPREHENSIVE PROBE ===
- Identified npm exports: main (index.js), ./agent (agent.js), bin: am, agentic-mermaid-mcp
- Dependencies: @resvg/resvg-js, mermaid-ast, yaml, entities, roughjs, elkjs, perfect-freehand
- Description: "render, verify, and safely edit Mermaid diagrams as ASCII, PNG, SVG, or structured agent workflows"
- Keywords list 12 families: flowchart, state, sequence, timeline, class, ER, journey, architecture, xychart, pie, quadrant, gantt
- Line 54: "All families parse, verify, render, round-trip: flowchart, state, sequence, timeline, class, er, journey, architecture, xychart, pie, quadrant, gantt"
- Lines 67-70: Library exports for agent API
- Lines 61-62: Warning codes organized in 3 tiers (Tier 1 structural, Tier 2 geometric, Tier 3 lint)
- Line 29: Core rule - "Run verify at every commit point"
- Line 26: Complete workflow explanation with segment-preserving diagram rules
- Lines 32-38: Detailed tier descriptions including warn codes and when to suppress vs inspect
- Syntax: group, service declarations with icons and optional parents
mechanisms: README.md (lines 30-38): 12 diagram families table with parse/verify/render/mutate status
llms.txt (line 54): Complete enumeration of all families
Instructions_for_agents.md (lines 32-38): Tier definitions for warning codes
Type definitions (agent.d.ts): Exported narrower functions for each family
Agent API: parseRegisteredMermaid, verifyMermaid functions enable programmatic validation
